tasks.label: e2e: start stack
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.e2e.yml up -d --wait --build db_e2e backend_e2e frontend_e2e && echo 'E2E stack ready — run e2e tests from Testing sidebar'
tasks.detail: Build and start the e2e Docker stack (uses host.docker.internal, no network connect needed)

tasks.label: e2e: stop stack
tasks.detail: Tear down the e2e Docker stack
